title: Fix streaming with descending unpacked arrays and unpacked-to-queue
body:
## Summary

This patch fixes two bugs in streaming operator handling for unpacked arrays, exposed after 316fb02 removed UNSUPPORTED errors (A follow-up of #7282). Descending-range unpacked arrays produced reversed element order during streaming, and streaming any unpacked array into a queue produced an empty queue (size=0). IEEE 1800-2023 Section 11.4.14 specifies that unpacked arrays are streamed in foreach traversal order, which for descending `[3:0]` starts at index 3. 

## Reproducer

```systemverilog
module t;
  logic [3:0][7:0] packed_din;
  logic [7:0] unpacked_des_dout[3:0];
  logic [7:0] unpacked_din[4];
  logic [7:0] queue_dout[$];

  always_comb begin
    {>>{unpacked_des_dout}} = packed_din;  // Bug 1
    {>>{queue_dout}} = unpacked_din;       // Bug 2
  end

  initial begin
    packed_din = '{8'h76, 8'h54, 8'h32, 8'h10};
    unpacked_din = '{8'h01, 8'h23, 8'h45, 8'h67};
    #1;
    // Bug 1: descending unpacked gets reversed order
    $display("unpacked_des[3]=%h [0]=%h", unpacked_des_dout[3], unpacked_des_dout[0]);
    // Bug 2: queue is empty
    $display("queue size=%0d", queue_dout.size());
  end
endmodule
```

On master:
```
unpacked_des[3]=10 [0]=76
queue size=0
```

Expected (Questa, correct per IEEE):
```
unpacked_des[3]=76 [0]=10
queue size=4
```

## Changes

- `V3EmitCFunc.h`: For descending UnpackArrayDType targets, emit `VL_REVERSE_UNPACKED(dest)` after `VL_UNPACK`; for descending sources, emit `VL_PACK(..., VL_REVERSED_UNPACKED(src))`
- `V3Const.cpp`: In LHS StreamR and StreamL handlers, route unpacked/queue/dynarray source to queue/dynarray dest through `CvtArrayToArray` instead of the broken `CvtPackedToArray(CvtArrayToPacked(...))` chain that produced width=0
- `include/verilated_funcs.h`: Add `VL_REVERSE_UNPACKED`, `VL_REVERSED_UNPACKED` helpers for descending element reorder; add `VL_COPY_Q`/`VL_REVCOPY_Q` overloads accepting `VlUnpacked` source

## Test

- Modified `test_regress/t/t_stream_unpack_lhs.v` -- uncommented 5 checks that were disabled with TODO markers

---
Developed by PlanV GmbH, assisted with Claude Code.

Reviewed by YilouWang.
